examples: Meekness means you have a teachable spirit.
Are you ready for the lesson of meekness?

Moreover, any investment banker worth his salt will tell you that there is not much money in meekness.
"Meekness, that attitude so tied to patience, to listening, and contemplation, sometimes in the collective imagination it is confused with weakness, " the pontiff wrote.
